items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Calbert Cheaney. Star at Indiana was drafted 6th in 93 by WAS. Initially tried as featured SG/SF. Peaked at 16.6 ppg but really wasn't scorer. Ended up as niche defender and good team guy. Lasted 6 yrs in WAS. From 99-06, he played w/BOS, DEN, UTA + GS before retiring.
